title: Makefile: fix Makefile variable syntax
body:
Currently `make runc all TAGS="apparmor seccomp"` fails due to bad variable expansion in the Makefile.

Closes #1203

comments.body: `-tags "$(TAGS)"` passes on my machine but fails on travis, while `-tags $(TAGS)` passes on travis but fails on my machine. Might be a `make` version issue.

I did some cleanup and made variable delimiters consistent.

The issue with quotes in Makefiles is make interprets them verbatim, so expanding a quoted variable recursively within another set of quotes unquotes part of the expanded data. I made sure that only the final expansions in recursions contained quotes.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably e5e4588) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
LGTM and happy green test buttons
